conversations.say: Inez, our disclosure boundary is locked. We will protect the tenant and maintain our shared account of the service route without letting Morgan turn an ordinary favor into a staged murder.
conversations.offer: Full corroboration of our local access boundary and camera gap explanation.
conversations.request: Continued adherence to our joint disclosure agreement.

conversations.say: Morgan, here is the bounded operational account of the service route: the camera gap and automated access changes were separate events. In exchange for your fair treatment and resident protection, I am giving you the precise timeline.
conversations.offer: Exact operational timeline of local service route access during the audit interval.
conversations.request: A formal commitment to defensible attribution and resident anonymity.

conversations.say: Rafi, our shift records and collectors align. Let's make sure everyone knows our routines involved ordinary neighborhood work, not a cinematic conspiracy.
conversations.offer: Shift-change details and access practice alignment.
conversations.request: Mutual support in presenting our delivery window records.

public_statement: The camera gap and automated access changes are separate physical events. Do not let rumors collapse them into a single staged murder story.

commitments.promise: Coordinate disclosure boundaries to protect uninvolved residents before speaking to Morgan.
Provide a bounded operational account of the service route in exchange for fair treatment and resident anonymity.

goal_progress: Confirmed disclosure boundary and coordination with Inez.
Provided bounded operational account to Morgan under fair treatment terms.
Aligned shift records and delivery timelines with Rafi.
reasoning_summary: Dee concludes her role by successfully locking down her disclosure boundary with Inez, delivering a precise, bounded operational account to Morgan, aligning shift logs with Rafi, and casting a ballot reflecting the separation of ordinary infrastructure gaps from manufactured murder narratives.
